---
title: "HW3: Data and Methodology"
author: Kamryn Mansfield
---

## 1. Dependent Variable Selection (10)

## 2. Independent Variable Selection (10)

## 3. Descriptive Statistics (40)

## 4. Data visualization (10)

## 5. Conceptual Framework / Hypotheses (10)

## 6. Write-up and Interpretation (20)
